title: CloudBackup
description: Automatically back up your Minecraft world and upload it to cloud services like Google Drive and Dropbox with CloudBackup. This mod features customizable settings for enabling/disabling backups and automatic uploads.
body:
CloudBackup Mod for Minecraft

CloudBackup is a mod for Minecraft that provides automatic backups of your world and allows you to upload them to cloud storage services like Google Drive and Dropbox. With CloudBackup, you can ensure that your progress is never lost in case of any unforeseen circumstances.

Dependencies

This dependencies is required up to minecraft version 1.20

  • Mod Menu (Fabric)
  • ClothConfig (Fabric and Forge)

Features

  • Automatic backups of your Minecraft world.
  • Upload your backups to cloud storage services like Google Drive and Dropbox.
  • Customizable backup settings to control the frequency and number of backups.
  • Option to enable/disable automatic backups and uploads.
  • Simple and easy-to-use configuration options.

How it Works

Once you install and configure CloudBackup, it will run in the background and automatically create backups of your Minecraft world according to the settings you've chosen. You can then upload these backups to your preferred cloud storage service with just a few clicks. CloudBackup also provides you with the ability to enable/disable automatic backups and uploads as needed.

Why Use CloudBackup

If you've ever lost progress in Minecraft due to a crash or some other unforeseen event, you know how frustrating it can be. With CloudBackup, you can take control of your backups and ensure that your progress is always safe and secure. Whether you're a casual player or a seasoned veteran, CloudBackup is a must-have mod for any Minecraft player who wants peace of mind.

Download CloudBackup today and start protecting your progress!
